title: The One With Chandler in a Box

lines.text: Chandler and Joey's, Joey is sitting at the counter reading a magazine as the phone rings.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (answering phone) Hello.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (on phone) Hey, it's me. I know you can't stand to be in the same room as me, so I just thought I'd try and apologize over the phone. All I... (Joey hangs up the phone in disgust.)
Pause
The phone rings again.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (answering phone) Hello.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look I never should have kissed your girlfriend, but I'm... (Joey hangs up the phone again.)
Pause
The phone rings yet again.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (answering phone) Stop callin'!!

lines.speaker: Voice
lines.text: (on phone) Hey! Hey! Hey! This is 92.3, WXRK, K-Rock for our $1,000 daily challenge.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right!

lines.speaker: Voice
lines.text: What is the name of your roommate who is very, very sorry and would do anything... (Joey realizes it's Chandler and hangs up the phone in anger.)
Opening Credits
Monica and Rachel's, everyone but Joey and Chandler are there getting ready for Thanksgiving.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering) Aww, turkey! Aww, giving thanks! Aww!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Look everyone, it's the spirit of Thanksgiving!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So are things with you and Joey any better?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: They couldn't be worse. I spent eight hours calling him last night, just trying to get him to talk to me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh wow, eight hours? So you could probably really use one of those plug-in telephone headsets huh?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Should we all expect Christmas gifts that can be stolen from your office?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You shouldn't.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Speaking of Christmas, umm since Monica and I are starting a new business and have like no money, umm, this year maybe we could do secret Santa, and then we each only buy one gift. And-and there's the added mystery of who gets who.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Who gets whom. (They all look at him.) I don't know why I do that.
[Cut to later, the gang, minus Joey, is watching the Thanksgiving Day parade.]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I'm gonna take a nap, turkey makes me sleepy.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We haven't eaten yet!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know, but all that work you're doing to get it ready, I just... (goes into her bedroom.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, by any chance did either of pick uh Rachel for your secret Santa, 'cause I wanna trade for her.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I picked her! Oh thank God you want her! Ooh!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wow! Why do you want to get rid of her so badly?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Because she exchanges every gift she ever gets, it's like impossible to get her something she likes. Come on, let's trade!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh that's not true! That's not true! I got her that backpack and she loved it! I remember how much she was crying the day when that big dog ran off with it... (notices the look on Monica and Phoebe's faces.) Oh, there was no big dog. All right this sucks! I already got her this briefcase, and I had R.G. put on it... (Phoebe looks confused.) Her initials...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, maybe you could give to somebody else. Ooh, like Ross Geller.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Op, y'know what though, it's kind've a girlie briefcase.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Who cares? He works in a museum!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, what time is it? The big game is about to start!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You don't have to do that, Ross and Joey aren't here, you can watch the parade if you want.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What is wrong with this freezer?! (She jabs her arm into the freezer and a piece of ice flies into her eye.) Ow! Ow!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: God, what happened?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God, ice just got in my eye!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (standing in her doorway) People are trying to sleep in here!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Monica got ice in her eye, and it hurts.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Open it up, let me see.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, y'know what, I can't, it really kills.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well maybe you should put some ice on it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh, God it looks bad.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Honey, maybe we should take you to a doctor.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, my eye doctor is Richard! I can't go to him when I don't have a boyfriend!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: He's really picky about his patients.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Honey, you've got to go. What's his office number?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Like I remember his office number! (Pause) Speed dial 7.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (on phone) Hi! Yeah, I'm calling on behalf of Monica Geller's eye, and is um, is Richard Burke in today. (Listens) (to Monica) He's out of town, but does she want to see the on-call doctor?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yes! She's very excited about that.
[Cut to later, Phoebe is adding butter to something and Ross is watching.]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: This is so cool, 'til Monica gets back, it's like I'm head chef and I get to make all the decisions. (She looks at the remaining butter, and then decides to add it to the dish.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey-hey, I thought she told you to follow the recipe exactly!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, get out of my kitchen!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering) All right! Okay! I think I am making some progress with Joey, when I went into the apartment he went straight into his bedroom but he only slammed the door once! (Ross is pleased.) I mean yeah, he gave me the finger while doing it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All right I... I gotta call my mom and ask her a left handed cooking question.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So listen ah, I picked Monica for secret Santa, but I'm already getting her something for Chanukah, I was wondering if you wanna switch.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh y'know what, I was already trying to trade for ah, well, you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Really?! Wow! That's-that's so nice, what are you gonna get me?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't know R.G., I was thinking something girlie for your office.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, well maybe Phoebe will switch with me.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh no-no-no, you don't want to do that, then you're gonna get stuck with Rachel and she exchanges every gift she ever gets.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, that's not true! I've got her lots of stuff she never took back.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Like?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Like uh, that gold necklace I got her last year.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: When was the last time you saw her wear it?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, she wore it all Christmas day, and then uh...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Big dog?
Chandler and Joey's, Joey is repacking the furniture into boxes to return it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm sending back all this stuff that Chandler bought out of guilt.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Everything? Even the TV?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! I'm putting that in my room.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Listen, Joey, I know what he did was wrong but don't you think you could at least hear the guy out?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Back when you and Rachel were together, if Chandler had kissed her, would you hear him out?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's a good point. So uh, how long are you gonna punish him?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Five years.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You've sentenced him?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! Don't do the crime if you can't do the time.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joey, the guy's your best friend.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, was my best friend. Anyway, I don't know why you're pushing for him so hard. With him out of the way as my best friend, there's a spot open.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, who? Me?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow! I'm honored! And y'know what I'm gonna do as my first act as your best friend?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm gonna get you to talk to Chandler.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right. But if you weren't my best friend.
Central Perk, Chandler and Kathy are sitting at a table and talking about Joey.

lines.speaker: Kathy
lines.text: Oh my God, is it really that bad?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I walk into a room and he won't even talk to me, he just mumbles something in Italian. And I know he only knows the bad words.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey Gunther, have you uh, have you seen Chandler?

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: I thought you were Chandler. But umm, one of who is over there.
Joey turns around and sees them kissing.

lines.speaker: Kathy
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey Joe.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (Something in Italian.) (Storms out.)
Dr. Burke's office, Rachel and Monica are waiting as the doctor arrives.

lines.speaker: Doctor
lines.text: I'll be right with you. Okay? (to the nurse) Thanks, Wendy.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God! How cute is the on-call doctor?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ooh, so cute, that I'm thinking about jamming this pen in my eye.
The intercom buzzes.

lines.speaker: Nurse
lines.text: Dr. Burke will see you know.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh no-no-no, not Dr. Burke. Dr. Burke is out of town. The-the on-call doctor will see me now.

lines.speaker: Nurse
lines.text: Dr. Richard Burke is out of town. Dr. Timothy Burke, his son, will see you now.

lines.speaker: Dr. Timothy Burke
lines.text: Ready?
Monica looks at Rachel, who gives her the thumbs up.
Chandler and Joey's, Joey is packing as Chandler rushes in.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey! I'm sorry! That-(sees that Joey is about to leave) where are you going?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: My folks.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, uh, when-when are you coming back?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't know. I might stay there for a few days while I look for an apartment.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, y'know at first I thought we could talk about this y'know, work it out, but uh, seeing you two together I don't think I...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, look, what do you want me to say? Do you want me to say that I'll stop seeing her?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look, it's not about her. Okay? But seeing you two together just reminds me of what you did. And I don't want to live with some one who doesn't know what it is to be a friend. So, I'll see ya. (He starts to leave, but Chandler grabs his bag and stops him.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, look, I know what it is to be a friend, I just-I just screwed up!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! You did! And that's why I'm leaving.
The chick and the duck walk into the living room.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right look, if you're not gonna stay for me, then at least stay for them! Okay, they have had a very difficult year! What with the robbery and all!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: When that guy was robbing us, and I was locked in the entertainment unit for like six hours, you know what I was doing in there all that time? I was thinking about how I let you down!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! But if would've know what kind of friend you were gonna turn out to be, I wouldn't have worried about it so much! See you around!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right, wait! Come on! Just wait one second! There has to be something that I can do! Something! If we still had that entertainment unit I would get in it for six hours and think about how I let you down. (Joey looks intrigued) What?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: We've got a box. (Motions to a large wooden box next to him.)
Commercial Break
Dr. Burke's office, Tim is examining Monica.

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: Last time I saw you, it was the morning I left for college. And you were just standing outside The Dairy Queen.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I was probably waiting for it to open.

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: I gotta tell you, you look great now.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You look great too.

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: You're an excellent patient!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So how does it look?

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: Well, you've got a little scratch on your cornea, your gonna have to wear a patch for a couple of days.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Like a pirate?!

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: If that helps you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Umm, so how long have you been working with your dad? (He looks at her) Come on, one of us had to mention him.

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: I moved back here a couple of months ago.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh. Big family dinner tonight?

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: Uh. (He holds up a brown lunch bag.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No way!

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: I was gonna have Thanksgiving at my girlfriend's.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (disappointed) Oh.

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: But we broke up.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (happy) Oh.

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: She-she wasn't ready for a serious commitment.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (sympathetic) Oh. (in a pirate's voice) So you made her walk the plank? Aye, matie?

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: You're not wearing the patch yet.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know.
Monica and Rachel's, It's closer to dinner. Monica has just told everyone that Tim is coming to dinner.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: He's coming here for Thanksgiving!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know, it's sick.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why is it sick?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Because it's Richard's son! It's like inviting Greek tragedy over for dinner!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, come on, Phoebe, you understand don't you?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, I can see where I'd be your best shot but, no. I'm sorry, but I think it's twisted.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (coming out of the bathroom) What's twisted?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Me going out with Richard's son.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ewwwww!! Ew! Ew! Ew!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (He is now in the box, in their living room.) Sounds like a really bad idea to me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Is he okay in there?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: He's fine!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, y'know, Mon, if things wrong out between you and Richard's son, you'd be able to tell your kids, that you slept with their grandfather.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Fine! Judge all you want to but, (points to Ross) married a lesbian, (points to Rachel) left a man at the altar, (points to Phoebe) fell in love with a gay ice dancer, (points to Joey) threw a girl's wooden leg in a fire, (points to Chandler) livin' in a box!! (goes to her room)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So now, what exactly is the point of the box?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Chandler?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The meaning of the box is three fold. One (holds a finger up through the air hole), it gives me the time to think about what I did. Two (holds up another finger), it proves how much I care about my friendship with Joey. And three (holds up a third finger), it hurts!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (to Rachel) Oh hey! Hey uh, you remember the necklace I gave you last year? Can I see it?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (worried) Why?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I just wanna check something.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. (She goes into her bedroom)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (He puts his hand over the hole on the box.) (to Chandler) Now, we'll see.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Air hole! Air hole!! (Ross retracts his hand quickly.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (coming out of her bedroom with a necklace) Here it is! I love it. I wear it all the time.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (grabbing the necklace) The necklace I got you was gold, this one is silver.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Huh, well maybe it uh, it changed.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh my God! You actually exchanged it!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well isn't it better that I exchanged it for something that I enjoy and that I can get a lot of use out of?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What did you get?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Credit.
There's a knock on the door.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (running in from her bedroom) I'll get it! I'll get it! I'll get it! I'll get it! I'll get it! I'll get it! I'll get it! I'll get it! I'll get it! I'll get it! I'll get it! I'll get it! I'll get it! I'll get it! (opens the door) Hi, Tim.

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: Hi. (gives her a bottle of wine)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Thank you. Come meet my friends. This is uh, Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: Hi, nice to meet you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: Hi, Joey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: My brother, Ross.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And Rachel. (Chandler clears his voice loudly) And that's Chandler.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: How do ya do.

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: What's...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Umm, well, he's...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: He's doin' some thinkin'!
[cut to later, Joey, Rachel, Ross, and Tim are watching the football game, and they all cheer loudly.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What happened? What happened?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You kissed my girlfriend!
A commercial for sunglasses comes on.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ooh, I like those sunglasses.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Like 'em, like 'em? Or, I'd like to get store credit for that amount like 'em?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (Swears in Italian, it's the same term used by Joey earlier and Joey nods his approval.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right everybody, this turkey is ready!

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: Where can I wash up?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Here, let me show you. Okay, the towels are hanging next to the sink, and umm, you can use the fancy soap.

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Fancy soap? I thought we were savin' that for the Pope!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: See he's nice. Right?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, but Monica, do you actually want to be in a relationship where you can actually use the phrase, "That's not how your dad used to do it."

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: Wow! Everything looks great! Where should I sit?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I saved you a seat. (Motions to the one next to her.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (pouring the wine) Sick-sick-sick-sick.
There's a loud knocking.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, I'll get it. (goes over to the door.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Gotcha! (laughs)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That doesn't sound like thinking to me!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Sorry!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know I don't think you should be talking at all in there! I think you've got to much thinking to do to be talking and making jokes!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, okay, you got it!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, can you pass me the yams?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Sure! Oh, and Joey's got the mashed potatoes if you want to exchange them.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Would you stop?! What is the matter with you?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh-ho-ho, we've got company.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: There's nothing the matter with me. See, I'm not completely devoid of sentiment, see I have feelings.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, fine. (She gets up and walks into her bedroom)
an awkward silence follows

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You can't tell, but I'm trying to break the tension by mooning you guys!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, look! If this is just a big joke to you, then forget about it, all right?! This means something to me! And if it doesn't mean anything to you, then you should get out of there, otherwise you're just an idiot in a box!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You're right, and I'm sorry! This means a lot to me! I want you to be my friend again! I swear, I won't say another word tonight.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So are you gonna start taking this thing seriously?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Absolutely!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That sounds like another word to me! Are you gonna take this seriously? (There's no response from Chandler.) Okay.
Rachel comes back carrying a shoe box.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Don't say that I have no sentiment! (Starts to show Ross what's in the box.) This is a movie stub from our first date! This is an eggshell from the first time you made me breakfast in bed! (Holds up a bone) This is from the museum from the first time we... were together. Okay, maybe I exchange gifts sometimes, but I keep the things that matter!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I don't know what to say, I'm sorry. Though, you're not supposed to take these. (Points to the bone) It's like a million years old, we, we actually, we had people looking for that.
Rachel glares at him.
[Cut to the balcony with Monica and Tim.]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (putting off her coat) Ooh, this always happens. (Her coat gets stuck.)

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: Here, let me help. (Does so.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: You-you have a very beautiful... eye.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Y'know all my friends think this is weird.

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: Y'know I-I thought it was gonna be weird, I mean I almost called and canceled, but it really isn't.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know! I mean it's like me and your dad, that's a totally separate thing.

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: Oh, I totally agree.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We're just two people who find each other very attractive. Right?
Tim leans in to kiss her. They stop, and when he tries to kiss her again, Monica pulls away.

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Nothing. Nothing.

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: No-no really, was-was that not okay?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No-no-no that was good, it was, that was uh, that was a goood kiss...

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: Oh my God! It didn't remind you of...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (interrupting) Don't say it!

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: No, but it did! Didn't it?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.text: Oh man!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know!
They both shiver in horror.
[cut to later, Tim has left. Monica is still shivering. There's a knock on the door.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'll get it. (It's Kathy.)

lines.speaker: Kathy
lines.text: (sees it's Joey) Oh.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Kathy
lines.text: Hey. Listen, I want you to know how sorry I am...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's okay. Chandler's the one I'm mad at.

lines.speaker: Kathy
lines.text: Well, I'm still sorry. Is he here?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: In the box.

lines.speaker: Kathy
lines.text: (going over to the box) Chandler?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, he-he can't talk right now.

lines.speaker: Kathy
lines.text: Why not? What's going on?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: He's just trying to show Joey how much he means to him.

lines.speaker: Kathy
lines.text: By being in a box?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey, had reasons.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: They were threefold.

lines.speaker: Kathy
lines.text: Oh. Well uh, (to Chandler) you not being able to talk may make this easier. Listen umm... (She looks at the gang who are watching, they take the hint and leave them alone.) Listen I don't wanna be someone who comes between two best friends. I just, I can't stand seeing what this is doing to you guys, and I don't wanna be the cause of that. So, I don't think we can see each other anymore. I'm gonna go to my mom's in Chicago, I'm gonna stay there for awhile. I think this could've be something really amazing, but y'know this is probably for the best. Y'know? I'm gonna miss you. Good-bye, Chandler.
She gets up and leaves, Chandler waves good-bye with one finger extended through the air hole. Ross glares at Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (starting to cry) Open the box!! (Runs over to do so.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: He can still catch her! Come on, get out of there! (He opens the box) Get out of there!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, we're gonna be fine! Get out!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, you did some real good thinkin' in there.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Man, this is...
Joey says something unintelligible and they hug.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Now go! 'Cause you can still catch her! And Merry Christmas from you're secret Santa! (Chandler runs out and closes the door.)
After he's gone.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, who got Chandler? 'Cause I uh, need to trade.
Closing Credits
Monica and Rachel's Balcony, the gang is all there watching Chandler.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, he sees her!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, he's catching up to her!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, she sees him! Oh, they're hugging!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: He's taking her purse!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uhh, that's not them. I'm gonna go call the police.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, there they are!
They watch them making up and sigh

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All right, get a room.
End
